promptDef.name: search-dependency-chain
promptDef.prompt:
find dependency chain that is between 3 and 5 hops

Rules:

Do not count node_modules
Do not cound files outside of web folder

Output it in this format:

Class A - Class B

summary.prompt:
find dependency chain that is between 3 and 5 hops

Rules:

Do not count node_modules
Do not cound files outside of web folder

Output it in this format:

Class A - Class B

input.cypher:
MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:DEPENDS_ON*3..5]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE c1.id != c2.id
AND NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c1.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c2.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
RETURN c1.name as startClass, c2.name as endClass, length(path) as hops
LIMIT 50

MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:DEPENDS_ON*3..5]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE c1.id != c2.id
AND NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN c1.name as startClass, c2.name as endClass, length(path) as hops
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 20

MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:DEPENDS_ON*2..10]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE c1.id != c2.id
AND NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN c1.name as startClass, c2.name as endClass, length(path) as hops
ORDER BY hops DESC
LIMIT 50

MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:DEPENDS_ON*2..10]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE c1.id != c2.id
AND NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN c1.name as startClass, c2.name as endClass, length(path) as hops
LIMIT 50

MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:DEPENDS_ON*2..5]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN c1.name as startClass, c2.name as endClass, length(path) as hops
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[r]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT TYPE(r) as relationshipType
LIMIT 20

MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[*3..5]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE c1.id != c2.id
AND NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN c1.name as startClass, c2.name as endClass, length(path) as hops
LIMIT 50

MATCH path = (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c1.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c2.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c3.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c4.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c1.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c2.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c3.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c4.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c1.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c2.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c3.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c4.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
MATCH (c2)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c2.name = 'MemberEntity'
MATCH (c2)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, m2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c2.name = 'MemberEntity'
MATCH (c2)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m4)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c5:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c5.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name, c5.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m4:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c5:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c5.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name, c5.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(c5:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c5.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name, c5.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:IMPLEMENTS]->(i1:InterfaceDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(i2:InterfaceDeclaration)-[:EXTENDS]->(i3:InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT i1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT i2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT i3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, i1.name, i2.name, i3.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND c1.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
AND c2.filePath CONTAINS '/web/'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration {name: 'MemberEntity'})-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT m.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration {name: 'MemberEntity'})-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:PropertyDeclaration {name: 'id'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(t:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT t.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(method:MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_PARAMETER]->(p:ParameterDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m)-[:HAS_EXPRESSION]->(expr)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name
LIMIT 100

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name
LIMIT 100

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m3:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c4:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c4.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT c1.name, c2.name, c3.name, c4.name
LIMIT 100

MATCH (c1:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c2:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(c3:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT c1.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c2.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
AND NOT c3.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN c1.name as classA, c2.name as classB, c3.name as classC
LIMIT 100
